Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Seishen Kingdom]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — The Seishen Kingdom is one of the two weakest vassal states under the Akura clan's protection.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 4''' — The Seishen Kingdom is located beyond the southern jungles and eyes the Blackflame Empire's lands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — The Seishen Kingdom is a kingdom with an elite class.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Kiro is the first prince of the Seishen Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The Empire is fighting against the Seishen Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 9''' — The Seishen Kingdom may be pushing against the Empire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — There was a feared broad attack from the Seishen Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — The Seishen Kingdom pushed to the edge of the portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 12''' — The Seishen Kingdom has an Underlady.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 13''' — The Seishen Kingdom is one of the factions Mercy mentions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 14''' — The Seishen Kingdom may have guards or walls built to prevent passage through the portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 15''' — The Seishen Kingdom has minted Underlords in the last two months.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — The Seishen Kingdom has a castle located in the Night Wheel Valley.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 16''' — The Seishen Kingdom has benefited from Charity's garden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The Seishen Kingdom had erected defenses on the other side of the portal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The Seishen Kingdom has sacred artists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 17''' — The Seishen Kingdom likely possesses ward keys for the boundary field.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 18''' — The Seishen Kingdom follows the Blackflame Empire's ship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 20''' — The Seishen Kingdom is a location where enemies can be sent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Mercy accused Akura Charity of warning the Seishen Kingdom.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — Lindon kept samples of armor from the Seishen Kingdom in his soulspace.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Seishen Kingdom's flags fly over the fortress wall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 9''' — The Seishen Kingdom prepares rooms for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — The Seishen Kingdom has walls.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — The Seishen Kingdom has a tiny cloudship.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 10''' — The Seishen Kingdom has constructions that look hastily built.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — The Seishen Kingdom has Golds who scout in cloudships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 12''' — The Seishen Kingdom is the home of Prince Daji.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon scavenged plates from the Seishen Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 20''' — The Seishen Kingdom has Soulsmiths who design constructs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Talking with the Seishen Kingdom would be uncomfortable for Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — Pride and Mercy fight side-by-side with the Seishen Kingdom Underlords.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 27''' — A Seishen Kingdom Underlord lay in pieces on the floor.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 3''' — Meira is the Underlady of the Seishen Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 4''' — The Seishen Kingdom raised a fortress at the border of Sky's Edge.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — The Seishen Kingdom has no further heirs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — The Seishen Kingdom is to become a vassal country of the Akura clan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Daji is the son of the Seishen Kingdom.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 9''' — Daji's actions put the Seishen Kingdom in danger.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 14''' — The Seishen Kingdom is a kingdom.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
